error_signature: vectors still set to 0 after update
title: Qdrant vectors not updating correctly
symptom: After attempting to update vectors in Qdrant, the response indicates success, but retrieving the point shows all vectors remain set to 0.
not_this_if: No issues with other Qdrant operations
root_cause: The issue arises when the Qdrant container is not set up with the correct disk share configuration. Using a user share instead of a disk share can lead to data not being persisted correctly, resulting in vectors not updating as expected.
fix_steps: Change the configuration to use a disk share instead of a user share
Attempt to update the vectors again
agent_instruction: Ensure the Qdrant container is configured with a disk share for proper vector updates.
